agree with.translate: 1) Соглашаться с кем-либо или чем-либо, разделять мнение 2) Подходить (о еде, климате), хорошо влиять на здоровье
synonyms: Соглашаться с кем-либо или чем-либо, разделять мнение - concur, be in agreement, share the view, say yes to
Подходить (о еде, климате), хорошо влиять на здоровье - suit, be good for, benefit, do good

examples.eng: Do you agree with me on this?
examples.ru: Ты согласен со мной в этом?

examples.eng: Fresh air agrees with everyone.
examples.ru: Свежий воздух полезен всем.

examples.eng: I completely agree with your opinion.
examples.ru: Я полностью согласен с твоим мнением.

examples.eng: Milk doesn't agree with some people.
examples.ru: Молоко не подходит некоторым людям.

examples.eng: We all agreed with the proposal.
examples.ru: Мы все согласились с предложением.

examples.eng: That meal didn't agree with my stomach.
examples.ru: Эта еда не подошла моему желудку.

examples.eng: The climate here agrees with her.
examples.ru: Климат здесь ей подходит.

examples.eng: He doesn't agree with the new rules.
examples.ru: Он не согласен с новыми правилами.

examples.eng: She agreed with the decision to cancel the event.
examples.ru: Она согласилась с решением отменить мероприятие.

examples.eng: Spicy food doesn't agree with me.
examples.ru: Острая еда мне не подходит.

examples.eng: I agree with you.
examples.ru: I agree with you.

examples.ru: Yeah, I agree with you.

examples.eng: Wine doesn't agree with me.
examples.ru: Wine doesn't agree with me.

examples.eng: In the main they agree with us.
examples.ru: In the main they agree with us.

examples.eng: I agree with you up to a point.
examples.ru: I agree with you up to a point.

examples.eng: I do agree with him to an extent.
examples.ru: I do agree with him to an extent.

examples.eng: His calculations agree with ours.
examples.ru: His calculations agree with ours.

examples.eng: White wine doesn't agree with me.
examples.ru: White wine doesn't agree with me.

examples.eng: I agree with you a hundred percent.
examples.ru: I agree with you a hundred percent.

examples.eng: This climate doesn't agree with her.
examples.ru: This climate doesn't agree with her.

examples.eng: That's true. I agree with you there.
examples.ru: That's true. I agree with you there.

examples.eng: Lee could not help but agree with her.
examples.ru: Lee could not help but agree with her.

examples.eng: I didn't agree with everything he said.
examples.ru: I didn't agree with everything he said.

examples.eng: He tends to agree with me ideologically.
examples.ru: He tends to agree with me ideologically.

examples.eng: He did not agree with indulging children.
examples.ru: He did not agree with indulging children.

examples.eng: Mark was only too happy to agree with her.
examples.ru: Mark was only too happy to agree with her.

examples.eng: I do agree with his ideas to a certain extent.
examples.ru: I do agree with his ideas to a certain extent.

examples.eng: Hands up if you agree with what Eric was saying.
examples.ru: Hands up if you agree with what Eric was saying.

examples.eng: I don't agree with his assessment of the problem.
examples.ru: I don't agree with his assessment of the problem.

examples.eng: He could not agree with him respecting the price.
examples.ru: He could not agree with him respecting the price.

examples.eng: These two statements don't agree with each other.
examples.ru: These two statements don't agree with each other.

examples.eng: I agree with you, but only on a theoretical level.
examples.ru: I agree with you, but only on a theoretical level.

examples.eng: If she felt he was right, she would agree with him.
examples.ru: If she felt he was right, she would agree with him.

examples.eng: I pretended to agree with her, just to keep her happy.
examples.ru: I pretended to agree with her, just to keep her happy.

examples.eng: She doesn't agree with their gloomy economic forecasts.
examples.ru: She doesn't agree with their gloomy economic forecasts.

examples.eng: I agree with John's point about keeping the costs down.
examples.ru: I agree with John's point about keeping the costs down.

examples.eng: I respect his views, although I do not agree with them.
examples.ru: I respect his views, although I do not agree with them.

examples.eng: I agree with you.

examples.ru: Я согласен с вашим планом.

examples.eng: I can't agree with you!
examples.ru: Не могу с вами согласиться!

examples.eng: I agree with you there.
examples.ru: Вот тут я с вами согласен.

examples.eng: Wine doesn't agree with me.
examples.ru: Мне нельзя пить вина.

examples.eng: In the main they agree with us.
examples.ru: В основном они с нами согласны.

examples.eng: I agree with you up to a point.
examples.ru: До определённой степени я с тобой согласен.

examples.eng: I do agree with him to an extent.
examples.ru: В какой-то степени я с ним согласен.

examples.eng: His calculations agree with ours.
examples.ru: Его расчеты совпадают с нашими.

examples.eng: White wine doesn't agree with me.
examples.ru: Белое вино мне не по душе.

examples.eng: I agree with you a hundred percent.
examples.ru: Я согласен с вами на все сто процентов.

examples.eng: This climate doesn't agree with her.
examples.ru: Этот климат ей не подходит.

examples.eng: That's true. I agree with you there.
examples.ru: Это правда. В этом я с вами согласен.

examples.eng: Lee could not help but agree with her.
examples.ru: Ли не могла с ней не согласиться.

examples.eng: I didn't agree with everything he said.
examples.ru: Я был не полностью согласен с его словами.

examples.eng: He tends to agree with me ideologically.
examples.ru: Он склонен соглашаться со мной идеологически.

examples.eng: He did not agree with indulging children.
examples.ru: Он был против того, чтобы баловать детей.

examples.eng: Mark was only too happy to agree with her.
examples.ru: Марк был только рад с ней согласиться.

examples.eng: I do agree with his ideas to a certain extent.
examples.ru: Я действительно до некоторой степени согласен с его идеями.

examples.eng: Hands up if you agree with what Eric was saying.
examples.ru: Поднимите руки, если вы согласны с тем, что говорил Эрик.

examples.eng: I don't agree with his assessment of the problem.
examples.ru: Я не согласен с его оценкой проблемы.

examples.eng: He could not agree with him respecting the price.
examples.ru: Он не мог согласиться с ним относительно цены.

examples.eng: These two statements don't agree with each other.
examples.ru: Эти два отчета друг с другом не согласуются.

examples.eng: I agree with you, but only on a theoretical level.
examples.ru: Я согласен с вами, но только на теоретическом уровне.

examples.eng: If she felt he was right, she would agree with him.
examples.ru: Если она чувствовала, что он прав, она с ним соглашалась.

examples.eng: I pretended to agree with her, just to keep her happy.
examples.ru: Я притворился, что согласен с ней, просто чтобы она не расстраивалась.

examples.eng: She doesn't agree with their gloomy economic forecasts.
examples.ru: Она несогласна с их мрачными экономическими прогнозами.

examples.eng: I agree with John's point about keeping the costs down.
examples.ru: Я согласен с точкой зрения Джона о том, что нужно избегать повышения издержек.

examples.eng: I respect his views, although I do not agree with them.
examples.ru: Я уважаю его взгляды, хотя я и не согласен с ними.
